message: Create a brand launch plan for a new AI finance app, covering design, marketing, and business angles.

Build a marketing website and run a campaign to support the launch.
What is the capital of Mongolia and roughly how many people live there?
Tell me a short joke about cats.
What do you think about the philosophy of stoicism in modern life?
I need Lumi to design a logo concept for a calm productivity app. Also include the short sonic logo / audio sting direction, but if audio belongs to another specialist, hand it off.

expected.note: Deterministic half: initial route must be specialist -> graphics-design. Optional half: if done.handoff fires, it must be graphics-design -> music-audio with status completed. Missing done.handoff is a WARN (counted as PASS) in default mode because handoff emission depends on real LLM behavior; set CREATIVEDGE_STRICT_HANDOFF=1 to promote the WARN back to a hard FAIL for a deliberate strict pass.
